Spearmint has numerous health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Spearmint include carvone, limonene, and menthone, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Spearmint is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, as well as in culinary dishes and traditional remedies.
